
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║    PRESENTATION PRO DESIGNER - CLAUDE SKILL INSTALLATION      ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

📦 WHAT YOU HAVE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ presentation-pro-designer.skill  (Main skill package)
✅ CLAUDE_GUIDE.md                  (Integration guide)
✅ TEST_CASES.json                  (Evaluation test cases)
✅ This installation file


🚀 INSTALLATION IN CLAUDE.AI
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Open Claude.ai in your browser

2. Go to: Settings → Features (or Custom Skills)

3. Look for "Upload Skill" or "Install Skill" button

4. Select: presentation-pro-designer.skill

5. Claude will extract and install automatically

6. Verify by starting a chat mentioning "presentation" or "slides"


✨ KEY FEATURES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 Type-Specific Workflows
   → Education, Corporate, Proposals, Investor, Product, Data Reports

📊 Comprehensive Routing
   → Classifies presentation type automatically
   → Loads only relevant reference documents
   → Smart clarifying questions (max 5)

🎨 Design & Branding
   → Applies your templates and brand rules
   → Enforces design consistency
   → Chart and infographic guidance

✅ Quality Assurance
   → Content accuracy checks
   → Design consistency verification
   → Accessibility review
   → Source governance

📚 Source Priority
   → User uploads highest authority
   → Never fabricates financial data
   → Cites all sources used


💡 HOW TO USE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Just mention presentations or slides in Claude:

✅ "Create a Series A pitch deck for our SaaS startup"
✅ "Edit my PowerPoint and apply our new brand guidelines"
✅ "Design a training presentation on our new product"
✅ "Make an investor deck using this financial data"
✅ "Create educational slides on machine learning"

The skill will automatically:
• Classify your presentation type
• Ask up to 5 clarifying questions (if needed)
• Load relevant workflows
• Apply your templates/brands
• Create or edit your presentation
• Run quality assurance checks
• Deliver with source summary


📋 SUPPORTED PRESENTATION TYPES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• Education & Training (lessons, courses, workshops, CPD)
• Corporate (company profile, stakeholder, internal)
• Business Proposals (client proposals, service pitches)
• Product/Service (product demo, SaaS deck, service overview)
• Verification/Profile (domain proof, claim verification)
• Investor Presentations (startup pitch, investment deck)
• Data Reports (KPI decks, analytics, performance)
• Existing PPTX Editing (redesign, polish, restructure)


📚 WHAT TO UPLOAD FOR BEST RESULTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Design & Branding:
✓ Design template PPTX (if you have one)
✓ Brand guidelines PDF
✓ Logo files
✓ Color palette specifications

Content & Data:
✓ Company profile or background docs
✓ Financial statements
✓ Research papers or source documents
✓ Data files or spreadsheets
✓ Competitor analysis

Existing Work:
✓ Current PowerPoint (for editing)
✓ Previous deck versions (as reference)
✓ Slide libraries (for reuse)


⚙️ WHAT'S INCLUDED
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Inside the .skill file:

SKILL.md                          Main instructions (Claude-optimized)
CLAUDE_GUIDE.md                   Claude.ai integration guide
TEST_CASES.json                   20 test cases for evaluation

agents/
  ├── claude.md                   Enhanced Claude workflow
  ├── openai.yaml                 ChatGPT Skills format
  ├── gemini.md                   Google Gemini format
  └── [other platform formats]

references/                        22 detailed workflow documents
  ├── content_type_router.md       (Classification guide)
  ├── education_decks.md           (Education workflows)
  ├── corporate_decks.md           (Corporate workflows)
  ├── proposal_decks.md            (Proposal workflows)
  ├── investor_decks.md            (Investor workflows)
  ├── brand_theme_protocol.md      (Brand enforcement)
  ├── chart_visual_guidelines.md   (Chart selection)
  ├── qa_checklists.md             (Quality assurance)
  └── [and 14 more reference docs]

scripts/                           Helper scripts
  ├── route_request.py
  ├── add_slide.py
  ├── deck_manifest.py
  └── [more utility scripts]

assets/                            Design assets
  └── sample-palettes/


📞 SUPPORT & DOCUMENTATION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Read CLAUDE_GUIDE.md for:
• Detailed installation steps
• Usage examples and workflows
• FAQ and troubleshooting
• Pro tips for best results
• Complete feature overview


🎉 YOU'RE READY!
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

After installation, start using by mentioning presentations or slides
in Claude. The skill will automatically activate and guide you through
creating professional presentations.
